response.justification: Strong technical IC with ~15 years across web, mobile, embedded, and clear developer-tooling/test-automation depth (built a D test runner, assertion library, CI/CD and GitLab infra, MCP code generators). That maps well to the engineering-productivity focus. However, the role is an explicit people-leadership position requiring 2+ years of direct people management, and the resume shows no manager title, direct reports, or formal team leadership beyond Staff/Senior IC roles and teaching. Worth a screen to probe leadership scope, but the management requirement is unverified.
strengths: Deep developer-tooling and test-automation experience (Trial test runner, Fluent-Asserts, CI/CD, GitLab/dev-ops setup)
15+ years across the stack including mobile (iOS/Apple TV) satisfying mobile-platform preference
Demonstrated knowledge-sharing/mentoring via workshops, dojos, and multi-module courses
concerns: No explicit people-management or formal team-lead role to meet the 2-year management minimum
No evidence of organizational-change leadership or roadmap/strategy ownership at team scope
Career is IC-titled (Staff/Senior Developer); manager-level performance and 1:1 experience unproven

key_factors.factor: Breadth of engineering experience incl. mobile
